name: Software Project V0
description: A minimal elicitation template for turning a vague software project idea into an Objective, Topic, and WorkItem.

questions.question: What are you trying to build, and why does it matter?
questions.paraphrased_question: State the project objective and its purpose.
questions.help_text: A good answer should help form a sentence like: As a user or builder, I can do something, so that a useful outcome is achieved.

questions.question: What is one major area or topic of work needed to make this objective real?
questions.paraphrased_question: Identify one meaningful topic under the objective.
questions.help_text: Examples: data model, UI, deployment, validation, planning workflow, execution boundary.

questions.question: What is one bounded work item inside that topic?
questions.paraphrased_question: Identify one concrete work item that contributes to the selected topic.
questions.help_text: A good work item should be small enough to inspect, refine, and eventually generate one or more executables.
